parameters.content:
## Kling AI Avatar

**Manual:** set file paths in Read nodes
**Webhook:** POST portrait + audio
**Env:** `FAL_API_KEY`
**Page:** `kling-avatar-tool/kling-avatar-upload.html`

## Webhook Upload

POST multipart/form-data:
- `portrait` (image)
- `audio` (audio)
- `prompt` (optional)

Production URL:
`/webhook/kling/avatar/generate`

HTML page:
`kling-avatar-tool/kling-avatar-upload.html`
